modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Student unable to access email due to mailbox error.

full_description_text:  
The student is trying to access their email through my.usd.edu. They receive an error stating that a mailbox cannot be found. The error indicates that the user account does not exist in the directory. This issue suggests that the student may not have a mailbox or a license assigned.
short_description: Student unable to access email due to mailbox error.
description: The student is trying to access their email through my.usd.edu. They receive an error stating that a mailbox cannot be found. The error indicates that the user account does not exist in the directory. This issue suggests that the student may not have a mailbox or a license assigned.
